task_completion.description: Access the Jitsi Meet configuration file
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor (e.g., nano, vim) or terminal command is shown opening or modifying the file specifically at '/home/ga/.jitsi-meet-cfg/web/config.js'.
The screenshot shows the configuration file being edited to include 'channelLastN: -1' (or similar valid JavaScript syntax).
The screenshot shows the configuration file being edited to include 'disableAudioLevels: true'.
The screenshot shows the configuration file being edited to include 'enableLayerSuspension: false'.

task_completion.description: Verify the new configuration is active and served by the web server
task_completion.visual_evidence: A web browser navigated to 'http://localhost:8080/config.js' or a terminal showing 'curl http://localhost:8080/config.js' displays the updated configuration file containing the newly added parameters.

integrity.description: The agent verified the configuration via the web server, not just the local file system.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser URL bar shows 'http://localhost:8080/config.js' and NOT a 'file://' URI, or the terminal uses 'curl http://localhost:8080/config.js' rather than just 'cat'ing the local file.

integrity.description: The agent modified the actual configuration file rather than creating a fake file.
integrity.visual_evidence: The file path being edited is explicitly '/home/ga/.jitsi-meet-cfg/web/config.js'.

integrity.description: The Jitsi Meet web server is actually running and serving the file.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser or curl command successfully loads the config.js file without a 'Connection Refused' or 'Not Found' error.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The configuration file is located at /home/ga/.jitsi-meet-cfg/web/config.js and served at http://localhost:8080/config.js. The valid required settings are 'channelLastN: -1' and 'disableAudioLevels: true'. The task also requests 'enableLayerSuspension: false', which is obsolete in this Jitsi version but should still be checked for as text added to the file by the agent.
